title: Thread Lifecycle and Stopping Mechanisms in Java
description: A flowchart depicting the states of a Java thread and the proper methods to safely stop or interrupt it, avoiding deprecated practices.
relationships: start() causes transition from NEW to RUNNABLE
run() method executes in RUNNABLE state
wait(), sleep(), join() cause transition to waiting states
interrupt() sets flag and can cause InterruptedException
Checking isInterrupted() allows for cooperative termination
